growth_records.lvlwhy: species-level trait compilation (Madin) — no strain recorded in source
growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: edwards.
growth_records.notes: growth_rate_per_h computed as ln(2)/doubling_time_h. Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.medium: Aquil-tricho (natural oligotrophic South China Sea surface seawater, 0.22 um-filtered, microwave-sterilized)

up.units: reported per-cell in Fig.1a / Source Data; absolute value not in article body text
reported per-cell in Fig.1a / Source Data; absolute value not in article body text
up.method: acetylene reduction assay, 4:1 ethylene:N2 conversion, 2 h in mid-photoperiod

growth_records.cite: Futing Zhang et al. Phosphate limitation intensifies negative effects of ocean acidification on globally important nitrogen fixing cyanobacterium. Nature Communications (2022). DOI:10.1038/s41467-022-34586-x. [PMC9640675]
growth_records.snippet: At a given growth rate of 0.2 day-1 ... the reservoirs contained Aquil-tricho medium with 1.2 uM NaH2PO4 ... delivered ... at the dilution rate of 0.2 d-1. In all experiments, cultures were grown at 27 C and ~80 umol photons m-2 s-1 (14 h:1
growth_records.notes: Prokaryote (cyanobacterium) diazotroph. Ambient/control pCO2 condition (400 uatm, per Supplementary Table 1). Growth rate set by chemostat dilution: mu = D = 0.2 day-1 at steady state => mu = 0.2/24 = 0.00833 h-1. Doubling time td = ln2/mu = 0.6931/0.2 = 3.466 day = 3.466*24 = 83.2 h. growth_method=calculated (converted from reported D=0.2 d-1). Temperature 27 C explicit. Culture pH not given in article body (in Supplementary Table 1, not read); pNPP assay buffer was pH 8.5 but that is an enzyme-assay buffer, not culture pH -> pH left null. C-fixation and N2-fixation rates are MEASURED experimentally (14C and acetylene reduction) but absolute per-cell values appear only in Fig.1a / Source Data / Supplementary Table 2 (not in machine-readable body text); article text reports only relative changes vs acidified condition, so absolute rates left null (not invented). PON:POP=48:1, POC:POP=332:1 for this ambient condition (Supplementary Table 2).
